title: Disney
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'Disney'?
What do you know about Walt Disney?
What do you think about the whole world of Disney?
Have you ever been (or would you like to go) to a Disney theme park?
Who is your favourite and least favourite Disney character?
Do you think Disney teaches children about anything?
Would you ever wear a Mickey Mouse T-shirt?
Why do you think so many people hate Disney?
What Disney movies have you seen and what did you think of them?
Do you think Disney goods are overpriced?
What Disney character are you most similar to?
Why do you think Disney continues to be so successful?
Do you think adults who are into Disney are strange?
Which company / character do you think is a close rival to Disney?
How American is Disney and the Disney message?
Do you or would you encourage your children to watch Disney shows and movies?
How much money would you need to be paid to dress in a Mickey Mouse costume?
What would Mickey Mouse do if he became President of the USA?
If you could ask Mickey Mouse a question, what would it be? What do you think his answer would be?
